display.purpose: Hero headings only. One per page. Combined Outfit weight-800 + Noto Sans KR for Korean.

body.purpose: Reading copy. Max 65ch. Korean uses weight-500 for optical parity.

label.purpose: Badges, tags, nav items. Tracking 0.05em for Latin only — never apply to Korean.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive card hover state. Blue-tinted ambient. Paired with translateY(-8px) scale(1.02).

shadows.name: cta-anchor
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA button in the hero only. The one shadow allowed at rest.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default for card hover and color transitions. 200-300ms.

motion.name: ease-enter
motion.purpose: Elements entering the viewport — slide-in, fade-in. 200ms.

motion.name: ai-loading
motion.purpose: AI recommendation loading bar. Bounces within track at 177.78% translateX.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Signal Blue CTA. Used for navigation-forward actions and form submissions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #2563eb; color: #f1f5f9; height: 36px; padding: 0 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Hero CTA Button
components.description: Oversized primary button for hero placement. Carries the one resting shadow allowed in the system.
components.css: .ds-btn-hero { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #2563eb; color: #f1f5f9; height: 56px; padding: 0 32px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -10px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.0, 0.0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-hero:hover { background: #1d4ed8; transform: scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 15px 35px -10px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.45); } .ds-btn-hero:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions and in-section navigation. No background at rest.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost">전체 보기 <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"></polyline></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #60a5fa; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #93c5fd; background: rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.05); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5); }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Top navigation link. Ghost at rest, Signal Blue tinted on active route.
components.html:
자격증 탐색
진로 및 직무 매칭
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; font-family: 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #94a3b8; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #f1f5f9; background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5); } .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1); color: #60a5fa; border-color: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2); }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Primary content card. Flat at rest, hover lift on interaction. Border shifts to accent on hover.
components.html:
자격증 탐색 및 상세 정보

전체 국가기술자격증 목록을 검색하고, 각 자격증의 상세 통계와 취득 정보를 탐색하세요.
components.css: .ds-card-feature { background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.4); border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.8,0.25,1), border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-card-feature:hover { background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.8); border-color: rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.5); transform: translateY(-8px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -20px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3); } .ds-card-icon { width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.05); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 24px; transition: transform 0.5s; } .ds-card-feature:hover .ds-card-icon { transform: scale(1.1); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #f1f5f9; margin: 0 0 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.625; margin: 0; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Hero search field. Full-width with icon offset, glow-on-hover container.
components.css: .ds-search-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; } .ds-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: #64748b; pointer-events: none; } .ds-search-input { width: 100%; height: 56px; padding: 0 16px 0 48px; background: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 12px; color: #f1f5f9; font-family: 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5); } .ds-search-wrap:hover .ds-search-input:not(:focus) { border-color: #334155; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Section label chip. Blue variant for features, indigo for AI/ML sections.
components.html: Core ModulesAI 추천
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 16px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border: 1px solid; } .ds-badge-blue { background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1); color: #60a5fa; border-color: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3); } .ds-badge-indigo { background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1); color: #818cf8; border-color: rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.3); }

components.name: AI Feature Pill
components.description: Inline label for AI-powered features. Sparkles icon + text, rounded-full, blue-tinted.
components.html: 국가자격 데이터 · 하이브리드 AI 추천
components.css: .ds-ai-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2); color: #60a5fa; font-family: 'Outfit', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview:
CertFinder is a tool for people who need to make consequential decisions about their career. The design reflects that weight. Like a high-end analytical instrument, every element is calibrated to function; decoration is a signal failure. The surface is dark not for aesthetic coolness but because this is a focused workspace, and focused work happens in low ambient distraction. Blue appears once, as a signal color, exactly as a gauge needle moves into a specific zone.

The system is built on a single restraint: one accent, used for one purpose. The electric blue is reserved for actionable elements and active states. When it appears, the user's attention follows. Its rarity is not a design quirk; it is the entire point. Neutral mid-tones carry the data. Typography does the hierarchy. The blue fires only when the user needs to act.

What this system explicitly rejects: the cluttered portal aesthetic of Q-Net and HRD Korea; the generic SaaS dashboard feel of shadcn defaults left unmodified; gamification excess that reduces a professional tool to a language-learning app; neon and glassmorphism that look distinctive but communicate nothing.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, near-black base (slate-950) with cool blue-indigo tint in the neutrals
Single signal color (electric blue) with strict surface coverage discipline
Dual-font system: Outfit for Latin display power, Noto Sans KR for Korean density
Tight radius vocabulary: components lean geometric, not soft
Data surfaces are content; chrome is minimal
Flat by default, elevation only on hover and focus states

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue is the only accent color. Indigo lives only inside gradients. Emerald lives only in success states. Purple appears only in the hero headline gradient and nowhere else. If you are about to apply color that does not fall into one of these four functions, the answer is a neutral.

rules.name: The No True Black Rule
rules.body: Surface Base is #020617, not #000000. Every neutral carries the cool blue-indigo tint of the palette. Pure black and pure white are prohibited; they read as errors in this system.

rules.name: The Korean Density Rule
rules.body: Korean characters are visually heavier than Latin at the same weight. At body size, use font-weight 500 for Korean-dominant paragraphs to maintain visual parity with Latin 400. Do not apply letter-spacing to Korean text.

rules.name: The Weight-First Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is weight before size. Do not create hierarchy by size alone; always pair a size step with a weight step.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If a shadow exists at rest, it is wrong. Tonal layering is the resting elevation system. Shadows appear only as a response to interaction: hover on cards, focus on inputs, lift on modals.

dos: Do use #2563eb as the only action accent. One signal color.
Do keep cards flat at rest — border border-slate-800, no shadow.
Do use weight contrast (700 vs 400) as the primary hierarchy signal before adjusting size.
Do set Korean body text at font-weight: 500 when in paragraphs.
Do constrain body copy to 65ch maximum line length on wide layouts.
Do use rounded-xl (12px) for cards and primary buttons; rounded-full for badges and pills only.
Do show the focus ring at full opacity: ring-[3px] ring-blue-500/50.
Do use tonal layering as the resting elevation system.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Use solid text-white or text-blue-400 instead.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default card style. The .glass utility is available only for the header and contextual overlays.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent). Use full borders, tinted backgrounds, or nothing.
Don't make it look like a generic SaaS dashboard: shadcn defaults unmodified, cream/white backgrounds, identical icon+heading+text card grids.
Don't make it look like a government portal: no dense tables without spacing, no low-contrast gray-on-gray text.
Don't add gamification patterns: no conspicuous XP bars in primary views, no animated confetti, no badge grids as primary UI.
Don't use neon borders, glowing outlines, or heavy glassmorphism.
Don't put shadows on cards at rest.
Don't use letter-spacing on Korean text.
